description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Request a geotechnical quote for a highway embankment project in Denver with a 2025 construction start and select the lowest-priced service option that includes slope stability modeling while keeping the budget at or below $15,000.

tasks.instruction: For a building foundations project, select a subsurface investigation package costing no more than $12,000 that explicitly includes both CPT soundings and consolidation testing, and save it under a project named "Headquarters foundation study."

tasks.instruction: In the project portfolio, filter to commercial building projects that use pile foundations and open the details for a project whose listed value exceeds $5 million.

target_names: Downtown Corporate HQ on Driven Piles

tasks.instruction: From the resources library, filter to intermediate-level guides or checklists on retaining wall design published in 2022 or later, sort by newest first, and download the most recent retaining wall design checklist as a PDF.

target_names: Intermediate Retaining Wall Design Checklist (2025 Update)

tasks.instruction: Book a 30-minute virtual consultation with a foundation design specialist for a concept/early design project on an available date in March 2025, choosing a time slot that starts between 10:00 and 10:30 AM and entering the contact details "Alex Martinez" with email "alex.martinez@example.com" before confirming.

tasks.instruction: Use a geotechnical calculator to compute the ultimate bearing capacity of a 2.0 m wide footing in medium dense sand at 1.5 m depth with a factor of safety of 3, then save the calculation result under a new project named "Office Tower A."

tasks.instruction: Use the website’s newsletter subscription form to sign up with the email "client.geotech@example.com," selecting slope stability and deep foundations as topics of interest, choosing a monthly email frequency, and indicating that you are a consulting engineer if that option is available.

tasks.instruction: In the team directory, filter to West-region geotechnical staff and add three experts to a project team shortlist, ensuring each has at least 10 years of experience and lists slope stability or landslide analysis as a key skill, then open the page showing your shortlisted team.
